title: Off-boarding Compliance Audit · Main_Org
subtitle: SOC2 / ISO27001 觀點 · 檢查 1+ 年未登入但仍持有 network 權限的帳號
compute_fns: (() => { const cf = window.computeFns; const STALE_DAYS = 365; const daysSince = ms => ms ? Math.floor((Date.now()-ms)/86400000) : Infinity; const stale = data => (data.memberships?.org_member_candidates || []).filter(m => daysSince(m.last_login_time) > STALE_DAYS); const accessSum = users => users.reduce((s,u) => s + ((u.networks||[]).length), 0); cf.stale_summary = (data) => { const s = stale(data); const oldest = s.sort((a,b) => (a.last_login_time||0) - (b.last_login_time||0))[0]; if (!oldest) return '沒有發現 1+ 年未登入的帳號。'; const days = daysSince(oldest.last_login_time); const yr = (days/365).toFixed(1); return `${s.length} 個帳號 1+ 年未登入仍可存取系統；最久未登入：${oldest.user_name||oldest.email} (${yr} 年前，持有 ${(oldest.networks||[]).length} 個 network 權限)。`; }; cf.stale_count = (data) => stale(data).length; cf.stale_subtext = (data) => { const s = stale(data); const admins = s.filter(u => u.org_role === 'admin').length; return admins > 0 ? `含 ${admins} 個 admin` : '無 admin'; }; cf.highrisk_count = (data) => stale(data).filter(u => (u.networks||[]).length >= 5).length; cf.highrisk_subtext = (data) => { const hr = stale(data).filter(u => (u.networks||[]).length >= 5); const top = hr.sort((a,b) => (b.networks?.length||0) - (a.networks?.length||0))[0]; return top ? `${top.user_name||'?'} × ${top.networks.length} nets` : '—'; }; cf.risk_access_count = (data) => accessSum(stale(data)); cf.risk_access_subtext = (data) => { const total = (data.memberships?.org_member_candidates||[]).reduce((s,m) => s + (m.networks||[]).length, 0); return `占總授權 ${(accessSum(stale(data))/Math.max(1,total)*100).toFixed(0)}%`; }; cf.never_logged_in = (data) => (data.memberships?.org_member_candidates||[]).filter(m => !m.last_login_time).map(m => ({label: m.user_name || m.email, tooltip: m.email})); })();

en.title: Off-boarding Compliance Audit · Main_Org
en.subtitle: SOC2 / ISO27001 lens · Find accounts that haven't logged in 1y+ but still hold network permissions
en.compute_fns: (() => { const cf = window.computeFns; const SD = 365; const ds = ms => ms ? Math.floor((Date.now()-ms)/86400000) : Infinity; const stale = data => (data.memberships?.org_member_candidates || []).filter(m => ds(m.last_login_time) > SD); const acc = users => users.reduce((s,u) => s + ((u.networks||[]).length), 0); cf.stale_summary = (data) => { const s = stale(data); const oldest = s.sort((a,b) => (a.last_login_time||0) - (b.last_login_time||0))[0]; if (!oldest) return 'No accounts dormant for 1+ years found.'; const days = ds(oldest.last_login_time); const yr = (days/365).toFixed(1); return `${s.length} accounts dormant for 1+ years but still have system access. Oldest: ${oldest.user_name||oldest.email} (${yr}y ago, holds ${(oldest.networks||[]).length} network permissions).`; }; cf.stale_count = (data) => stale(data).length; cf.stale_subtext = (data) => { const s = stale(data); const admins = s.filter(u => u.org_role === 'admin').length; return admins > 0 ? `incl. ${admins} admins` : 'no admins'; }; cf.highrisk_count = (data) => stale(data).filter(u => (u.networks||[]).length >= 5).length; cf.highrisk_subtext = (data) => { const hr = stale(data).filter(u => (u.networks||[]).length >= 5); const top = hr.sort((a,b) => (b.networks?.length||0) - (a.networks?.length||0))[0]; return top ? `${top.user_name||'?'} × ${top.networks.length} nets` : '—'; }; cf.risk_access_count = (data) => acc(stale(data)); cf.risk_access_subtext = (data) => { const total = (data.memberships?.org_member_candidates||[]).reduce((s,m) => s + (m.networks||[]).length, 0); return `${(acc(stale(data))/Math.max(1,total)*100).toFixed(0)}% of total grants`; }; cf.never_logged_in = (data) => (data.memberships?.org_member_candidates||[]).filter(m => !m.last_login_time).map(m => ({label: m.user_name || m.email, tooltip: m.email})); })();

ja.title: 退職権限監査 · Main_Org
ja.subtitle: SOC2 / ISO27001 観点 · 1 年以上ログインしていないがネットワーク権限を保持しているアカウントを抽出
ja.compute_fns: (() => { const cf = window.computeFns; const SD = 365; const ds = ms => ms ? Math.floor((Date.now()-ms)/86400000) : Infinity; const stale = data => (data.memberships?.org_member_candidates || []).filter(m => ds(m.last_login_time) > SD); const acc = users => users.reduce((s,u) => s + ((u.networks||[]).length), 0); cf.stale_summary = (data) => { const s = stale(data); const oldest = s.sort((a,b) => (a.last_login_time||0) - (b.last_login_time||0))[0]; if (!oldest) return '1 年以上未ログインのアカウントは見つかりませんでした。'; const days = ds(oldest.last_login_time); const yr = (days/365).toFixed(1); return `${s.length} 名が 1 年以上未ログインのままアクセス可能。最も古い：${oldest.user_name||oldest.email}（${yr} 年前、${(oldest.networks||[]).length} 個のネットワーク権限を保持）。`; }; cf.stale_count = (data) => stale(data).length; cf.stale_subtext = (data) => { const s = stale(data); const admins = s.filter(u => u.org_role === 'admin').length; return admins > 0 ? `admin ${admins} 名含む` : 'admin なし'; }; cf.highrisk_count = (data) => stale(data).filter(u => (u.networks||[]).length >= 5).length; cf.highrisk_subtext = (data) => { const hr = stale(data).filter(u => (u.networks||[]).length >= 5); const top = hr.sort((a,b) => (b.networks?.length||0) - (a.networks?.length||0))[0]; return top ? `${top.user_name||'?'} × ${top.networks.length} nets` : '—'; }; cf.risk_access_count = (data) => acc(stale(data)); cf.risk_access_subtext = (data) => { const total = (data.memberships?.org_member_candidates||[]).reduce((s,m) => s + (m.networks||[]).length, 0); return `全権限の ${(acc(stale(data))/Math.max(1,total)*100).toFixed(0)}%`; }; cf.never_logged_in = (data) => (data.memberships?.org_member_candidates||[]).filter(m => !m.last_login_time).map(m => ({label: m.user_name || m.email, tooltip: m.email})); })();
